summary: Kimi Antonelli seizes control at Spa with pole position, signaling Mercedes' challenge to Verstappen's dominance while George Russell struggles in fourth. Lando Norris fights uphill from a 10-place grid penalty as Lewis Hamilton's recent Ferrari momentum builds pressure on the Maranello squad to capitalize on newfound confidence. Victory here could reshape the championship battle, offering either Mercedes a statement win or Ferrari the validation to sustain their resurgence after Hamilton's Spanish breakthrough.
